name: Avial (Vegetable Stew) (s)
recipeIngredient: 1 large sweet potato, peeled and cubed
1 cup green peas, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Par-boil the vegetables (except peas and tomatoes) in 2 cups of water with turmeric and salt.
2. Add the remaining vegetables towards the end when others are cooked.
3. Grind coconut, green chilies, and yogurt to a smooth paste using a blender or hand-held blender.
4. Add the paste to the pot containing the boiled vegetables.
5. In a sauté pan, melt ghee and lightly cook karhi leaves for about 1 minute.
6. Add the cooked leaves to the pot and simmer for a couple of minutes.
7. Combine all ingredients and serve.
